task_description: Implement remaining VPN Core Improvements: WireGuard API endpoints and client config (Task Group 4), IPv6 dual-stack (Task Group 5), Real-time bandwidth display (Task Group 7), and Automatic certificate rotation (Task Group 8).

verification.summary: go build ./... and go test ./... both pass cleanly. All new tests exercise real logic (tc parsing, delta rate calculation, fingerprint, config generation, IPv6 validation) and would fail if their implementations were reverted.
